name: Advanced Wireless & Antenna Inc.
summary: Advanced Wireless & Antenna Inc. manufactures and sells computer and communication connectors in Taiwan and internationally. It offers Wi-Fi, NFC, networking, and 3D antennas; and NFC modules with antennas, as well as Netcom antennas. Its products are used in computer, electronic communication, telecommunications, automotive, medical, and Internet of Things and other related markets. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
